venue_weather.precipitation: exact hourly forecast unconfirmed; Mexico City altitude is the confirmed material venue factor
venue_weather.impact: medium: high altitude can reduce sprint recovery and slow late-game tempo

win_draw_loss.reason: Colombia have the stronger attack and squad depth, but Uzbekistan's low block and altitude keep upset/draw risk alive.

handicap.reason: A narrow Colombia win is more robust than asking them to clear a large margin against a compact debutant.

correct_score.reason: Best fit for Colombia edge against a disciplined Uzbekistan block.
Uzbekistan can score through Shomurodov or a set-piece/transition moment.
Colombia upside if Diaz and James create early separation.

total_goals.reason: Uzbekistan are expected to defend deep and Mexico City altitude can reduce late tempo.
Requires an early Colombia goal or a game-state chase.

half_full_time.reason: Colombia can grow into the game after testing Uzbekistan's block.
Only if Colombia's first-half wing pressure lands early.
A compact Uzbekistan plan can hold if Colombia lack finishing precision.

fixture.notes: Colombian coverage lists Colombia vs Uzbekistan at 21:00 Colombia time, corresponding to 20:00 Mexico City local time.

sporttery.note: No verified public China Sporttery price was available from this run.

comparison_odds.note: Group outrights only, not match odds or Sporttery.

team_news: Nestor Lorenzo said all Colombia players, including Jhon Cordoba, are in good physical condition and stressed that there are no small teams.
Luis Diaz and James Rodriguez are Colombia's highest-profile creative leaders.
Uzbekistan are World Cup debutants under Fabio Cannavaro, with Abdukodir Khusanov and Eldor Shomurodov as key players.
Jaloliddin Masharipov has been noted as carrying a back issue.
weather_venue: Estadio Azteca/Mexico City Stadium sits around 2,200 metres above sea level.
Exact kickoff temperature, humidity, wind and precipitation values were not verified in this run.
The stadium is outdoors with a hybrid grass surface after World Cup renovations.
historical_structural: Uzbekistan and Colombia have never met before.
Uzbekistan are the first Central Asian nation to reach the World Cup.
Colombia return after missing 2022 and have a high-ceiling attack but some defensive volatility.

risks: Official China Sporttery prices and single-match status unavailable.
Colombia can become vulnerable if fullbacks push high and lose transition control.
Uzbekistan's debut energy and compact shape can keep the match close.
Mexico City altitude can change late-game tempo and finishing.

post_match_review.variance_note: Colombia win direction was correct, but Uzbekistan scored after the break and Colombia added a stoppage-time third, pushing the match beyond the projected low-goal band.
